form.selectTitle: Select product(s) you want to return

errors.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.

reasons.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe why you want to return this product(s)

upload.title: Upload at least one image or video of the returned products
upload.browseText: Browse and chose the files you want to upload from your computer

success.submittedMessage: Your request has been submitted successfully.

validation.productRequired: You must select at least one product
validation.imageRequired: You must upload at least one image or video
validation.invalidFormat: Only images (jpeg, png, jpg, webp) and videos (mp4, qt, mov, avi) are allowed
validation.fileSizeLimit: Images must be under 5MB and videos must be under 20MB
validation.descMinOther: Description for 'Other' reason must be at least 5 characters long
